features: Safe and Hygienic: The Mspan Electric Toothbrush Cover is designed to keep a toothbrush clean and safe at home, camping, school, travel, gym, and work. Protect your toothbrush from bathroom dust, with better sanitary and oral care. The set of 4 also ensures that the toothbrush head protector can be shared with family, friends, and travel friends

Fits most toothbrush heads: the Mspan sonic toothbrush cap is suitable for most manual and electric toothbrushes, and solves cross-contamination between toothbrushes; the battery toothbrush cover also protects your toothbrush from direct contact in the bathroom or travel bag

VENTILATION HOLES HELP IT DRY - The Mspan toothbrush protector comes with 4 vents for air circulation, and the vented cover helps dry your brush head faster. Innovative structural design keeps bristles straight for effective cleaning. This electric toothbrush case is a great gift for yourself and your friends

Adorable and easy to use: the design of the rotating toothbrush cover is lovely, allowing you to have fun while keeping your toothbrush clean. You can easily clip the toothbrush protection cap onto a small and large toothbrush head with one hand. A set of 4 colors, orange, purple, pink, transparent. The 4 colors make it easy to label your family's toothbrushes. Perfect for wrapping loose toothbrushes

More environmentally friendly: the toothbrush cover is made from PCTG, it is easily recycled, making it renewable, food-grade plastic, and is BPA-free, phthalate-free, and PVC-free. The toothbrush top is a very cool bathroom accessory; the electronic toothbrush cover is perfect for your electric toothbrush, portable toothbrush, and replacement brush head
description: Product Description The Toothbrush Cover Perfectly Compatible With Sonicare & Oral B Braun Electric Toothbrush Fits Most Standard & Electric Toothbrushes The toothbrush cover is compatible with sonicare electric toothbrush, oral b electric toothbrush,and most manual toothbrush. Easy To Use Open / close clip design keeps the toothbrush cover from accidentally opening during travel, snaps closed very tightly. Easy To Identify Your Toothbrush Four pack has different colors so everyone gets their own color for easy toothbrush identification. What You Get: 4 * Toothbrush Covers Perfect For Traveling And Easy To Clean Great for traveling to keep toothbrush head clean and separated. The toothbrush cover is made of premium food grade BPA free material.
